title: 5 things every AI agent harness needs
summary: Muhammad Farooq outlines 5 critical components required for AI agent harnesses to move from demos to shipped products. The emphasis is on the infrastructure and systems that operationalize AI model predictions into finished tasks.
writeup: Muhammad Farooq lays out five components that an AI agent harness needs to move agents from demos to shipped products. The focus is on the infrastructure and systems that turn model predictions into completed tasks, with attention to edge deployment. The framing is operational: what surrounds the model determines whether an agent finishes real work rather than the model alone.
